Sourav Ganguly: BCCI Message to Mohammed Shami ‘Stuns’ Former Captain

Sourav Ganguly: BCCI Message to Mohammed Shami ‘Stuns’ Former Captain

Former India captain Sourav Ganguly has expressed shock at the messaging from the BCCI regarding veteran pacer Mohammed Shami, criticizing the communication style and questioning the board’s approach toward senior players.
